commands.review_summary:
The PR adds paginated WebChat history loading through Gateway `chat.history` metadata, a Load older messages UI control, docs, mock scenarios, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +456, Tests +513, Docs +2, Other +108. Total +1079 across 25 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source, but not from a live run in this read-only review: current main only returns a bounded recent `chat.history` slice and the UI caps rendered history, so older useful turns can be unreachable when hidden/tool-heavy entries dominate the tail.
commands.review_followup: This is a protected maintainer draft with a self-reported cursor-edge concern, so the next step is human Gateway/UI review rather than an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(webchat): paginate tool-heavy chat history
target.body:
## Summary
- Add paged `chat.history` support with `beforeSeq`, `hasMore`, `nextBeforeSeq`, `oldestSeq`, and `newestSeq` metadata.
- Update WebChat to render a top-of-thread `Load older messages` control, prepend/dedupe older pages, and keep input recall capped separately from loaded history rendering.
- Add backend/UI/E2E coverage plus a Control UI mock scenario with multi-page tool-heavy history for local inspection.

## Behavior addressed
WebChat now has an actionable recovery path when Codex tool-heavy transcript entries push useful user/assistant turns outside the initial bounded history slice.

## Real environment tested
Local Codex worktree with the Control UI mock dev server at `http://127.0.0.1:5187/chat`.

## Exact steps or command run after this patch
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts src/gateway/protocol/index.test.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.ui-e2e.config.ts --configLoader runner ui/src/ui/e2e/chat-flow.e2e.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `node --import tsx scripts/control-ui-mock-dev.ts --port 5187`
- Playwright: opened `/chat`, verified recent page, clicked `Load older messages` twice, verified older pages prepend and button disappears when `hasMore=false`.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

## Evidence after fix
- Focused local bundle: 7 files passed, 350 tests passed.
- UI E2E: 1 file passed, 2 tests passed.
- `git diff --check`: passed.
- Local screenshots captured for maintainer inspection in the worktree, not committed.

## Observed result after fix
Recent history loads immediately, older history can be requested by cursor, tool/control-heavy hidden entries no longer consume the visible page size in the covered local WebChat path, and repeated mock loads stop cleanly when no older page remains.

## What was not tested
- Crabbox/Testbox broad gate: blocked in this worktree because the configured Blacksmith Testbox workflow step was unavailable, and the fallback provider path lacked AWS credentials.
- Autoreview still reports an imported Claude CLI plus very long local transcript cursor edge. This draft keeps that concern visible for reviewer discussion before marking ready.

Release note context: Fix WebChat history recovery for Codex tool-heavy sessions by adding bounded older-message pagination. Thanks @BunsDev.
target.author: bunsdev

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
